# Git Blame Life

> Git blame but for life decisions — find out who's really responsible.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Web Audio API, Lucide React

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — Main application component
- src/components/ — UI components (roulette wheel, timeline, PR reviews, etc.)
- src/data/ — Life decisions, blame targets, merge conflicts
- src/hooks/ — Custom React hooks
- src/utils/ — Utility functions

## Features
- Blame roulette wheel
- Life timeline (git log style)
- Merge conflicts between plans and reality
- PR reviews for life decisions
- Revert button (always fails)
- Achievement system

## URLs
- Live: https://git-blame-life.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/git-blame-life
